zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edmund Fitton於大約1256年出生在英國英格蘭爾波利 費時，他的父親Hugh Fitton of Bollin24歲，母親Mrs. Hugh Fitton25歲。他於大約1273年與Lady Ellen Joyce在英國爾波利 費結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1298年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

nameMeanings.name: Fitton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Middle English fiton, fittin ‘lie, falsehood’, for a lier or cheat.

possibly a habitational name from Fitton Hall in Leverington, Cambridgeshire, named in Anglo-Scandinavian as ‘settlement by the meadow-land’, from Old English tūn + Old Norse fit, a term denoting grassland on the bank of a river.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edmund Fitton was born about 1256, in Bollin Fee, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Fitton of Bollin, was 24 and his mother, Mrs. Hugh Fitton, was 25. He married Lady Ellen Joyce about 1273, in Bollin Fee, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1298, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edmund Fitton est né environ 1256, à Bollin Fee, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Fitton of Bollin, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Hugh Fitton, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Ellen Joyce environ 1273, à Bollin Fee, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1298, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Fittonが約1256年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボリン フイーで生まれた時，父Hugh Fitton of Bollinは24歳，母Mrs. Hugh Fittonは25歳であった。約1273年にイギリスチェシュアイアボリン フイーでLady Ellen Joyceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1298年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edmund Fitton(이)가 대략 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 볼린 프이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Fitton of Bollin(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Hugh Fitton(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1273년 영국 체실르 볼린 프이에서 Lady Ellen Joyce(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1298년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edmund Fitton nasceu aproximadamente 1256, em Bollin Fee, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Fitton of Bollin, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Hugh Fitton, tinha 25 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edmund Fitton родился около 1256 г. в местности боллинь фи, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Fitton of Bollin было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Hugh Fitton, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Ellen Joyce около 1273 г. в местности боллинь фи, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1298 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.
